Dragon: As a red seal you are Strong-hearted, a way of being that generates will power and fuels the initiator in you. This strength sustains your willingness to keep looking at the state of your life, the lives of those around you and the wider world. This way you can bring awareness to yourself and others about what is missing, and what it will take to restore and nurture a better quality of life. As Dragon you are the keeper of the memory bank of all that has ever happened, and all that is possible. Our purpose and potential which are both timeless and limitless, simply need to be re-awakened. Your special gift is that of intention, the birthing force of life. Your intention gives you the power to attract, embody and direct the primal life force energy of the universe. This keeps you and your projects nurtured and grounded in the pregnant moment of NOW. Harnessing this creative force for life, you step into your role as the ‘earthing birther’. Midwife to the re-birth of yourself and others, you facilitate that life can be re-created in the moment, any time you choose, endlessly.
Wind: As a white seal you are open-hearted. This way of being makes you a clear channel for the giving and receiving of love, and a dependable messenger of truth. Being open, you are a gateway for Spirit to experience itself within and through humanity, and humanity to experience itself as spirit. Being ‘in spirit’, you are inspired. You represent the breath of life, purpose and potential, that God breathed into Man. As Wind you have the gift of showing people the power of their breath (?) to reconnect them with the memory of their purpose for being here, and their limitless potential. A receiver and transmitter of this message of re-awakening, you are a natural communication tower and portal. The message of Higher Truth you receive at any time, opens, clears and refines your life path, and the path of those you inspire. Rising to your calling breathes fresh breath into rediscovering who you are, and re-creating your life anew. Your gift of communication of Spirit, uplifts you and those whose lives you touch, preparing you for life’s inevitable winds of change.
Night: Being a blue seal, you are clear-hearted. This way of being creates an empty, womb-like space in which your dreams can be written, nurtured and ultimately birthed. Surrendering ‘sweetly’ to this creative dream state, you embrace your intuition as your primary guide. Your dreams bring you the memory of your profound purpose and potential. Your intuition guides you to choose and shape those aspects of your self and your life that will serve for the higher good. Only through complete commitment to your choice, will you re-awaken who you really are, and who you can possibly become. Releasing attachment to ego and logic, you move ‘out of the way of yourself’, removing all barriers to universal abundance and prosperity. Your surrender allows you to harness the powerful guidance of the ‘dream time’, to become your dream and vision for a changed reality. Equally, you can awaken in others the power of dreams to trigger memory, and the power of intuition to guide achievement. When you instil in others these secrets of prosperity, you become a gateway for the manifesation of Vision, you create a more abundant and prosperous world for all, and you take a quantum leap forward in your personal journey of transformation and growth.
Seed: As a yellow seal you are whole-hearted. This way of being is the fullness of the cup that ‘runneth over’ and the flower that bursts into bloom - Free to blossom, free to grow and free to be alive. As Seed, you hold the DNA blueprint, the memory of the unfoldment of all aspects of life, from genetic evolution through to the unfolding of our higher purpose and potential. Your freedom to flower re-awakens the memory of Creation, and therefore the memory of your creation. In this infinitely fertile garden of life you are free to re-create yourself and your life as you please, purely by choosing. Every idea you’ve reaped is an idea that you’ve sown based on your past thoughts and ideas. Yet an idea is just a pattern of perception which can be changed. Recognition that you have chosen and created your present life experience exactly as it is, is what keeps you free to choose again. Being both sower and reaper puts you at cause in your life. Ownership of your universe frees you to create a new life for yourself, and a world in which all can flourish in their purpose and potential.
Serpent: As a red seal you are Stronghearted - a way of being that gives you the willingness to take a stand on the choices you make in life. Your strength of resolve gives you the vitality to see your choices and projects through. Your vitality is nurtured and sustained when you dig deeply into your ‘inner storehouse’ to access the Source of your talent and power . These resources will ensure the rejuvenation of your self, the juices of success of your projects, and the re-creation of your life and world. Your strength of intention keeps you connected with Source. When you live life through your senses your instinct is sharpened and you become a sensual being. As a result you embody the life force energy of the universe. This connects and earths you in the moment of NOW while it energizes you, to initiate for the greater good. ”Ideas leave not their source”. Therefore as it is our creation ‘package’, sex must come from our Creator. It will therefore lead us back to our creator. Your connection to both the earth and the Universe puts you, as Serpent, in a unique position to connect the two through sexual energy directed with pure, clear and highest intent.
World-Bridger: As a white seal you are open-hearted, a way of being that facilitates your being a bridge. Your openness leaves the communication lines clear for messages to be sent and received without interference: Messages between all levels and dimensions of existence, between people and each other and between people and new opportunity. Your special gift is the overcoming of the fear of death, the one fear on which all other fear is based. At a deep level you know that who we really are is greater than we can imagine, and never dies. This aspect of ourselves clothes itself in different forms at different times, yet transcends all notions of space and time. When you know that death is not real then the fear of death disappears, and with it all other fear. This creates the space or vacuum for full and direct access to the one Source of all power and talent, reconnecting you and those whose lives you touch, with the fullness and fulfilment of life. Your calling is to clearly communicate to others the need to release all fear, be it in the form of attachment, resentment, jealousy or guilt, so they can become a clean slate in their own lives, on which a Higher Truth can be received, and new opportunity seized.
Hand: As a blue sign you are clear-hearted, a way of being that aligns you with the healing power of the universe and allows you to embrace it fully, for the benefit of yourself and others. As Hand you know that healing is the return to our natural state of wholeness, and true health occurs as we grow into our purpose or vision for life. Standing at the threshold of third dimensional reality, your hands tap into the quantum field of wholeness just beyond normal vision and grasp, becoming ‘hands of light’. In this field of reality, healing, recovery and achievement defy all normal routes of received wisdom, sometimes being referred to as ‘miraculous’, ‘freak-’ or ‘uncommon’. Accessing the Source of all power and wholeness, you access your power and talent to heal and restore, empower and accomplish. Your submersing into this wellspring of health and vibrancy is your commitment to reconnect with the power and wholeness of life. ‘Dharma’ a hindu notion, sums up the essence of hand: When you love your work, express your unique talents, and live life through the question, “How can I serve”, then you experience wholeness - healing has taken place. As you benefit your fellow human and yourself, you become the tuning fork that reattunes and realigns, thus becoming your vision for positive change.
Star: As a yellow seal you are whole-hearted. This way of being is the fullness of the unborn star ready to explode into light. Being free to access the Source of all light you are free to reconnect with the source of your own power & talent. Tapping this Power of Creation, you move beyond any desire for ‘15 minutes of fame’ - to become the ‘star’ that you truly are. Dancing in the light, you begin dancing in ‘delight’ - artful and celestial, radiant in your beauty. Free and empowered, you can paint, sing or dance your way to re-creating yourself, and creating the life you choose. As you choose to see things differently and become responsible for your world as it is now, you shed new light on your power to create. Owning a changed pattern of perception allows enlightenment to ignite and elevate you to a new level of being . You then fulfil your role as the eighth seal, the role of the octave jump, the paradigm shift, the quantum leap. Dancing in the pure light of your power and talent you reach for the stars via the inner star of YOU.
Moon: You are a Strong-hearted red sign. This way of being empowers you to become master of your emotions. Supering your emotions you come to strike the fine balance between will-power and flow - choosing and intending a new attitude and quality of life and then flowing with the experience that issues from your choice. Striking this balance, you are able to process and purify both your power and purpose. As you discover that ‘power over’ serves no earthly good, you release any need to control. Allowing this to dissolve gives it the space to resurface as empowerment of yourself and others. And as you come to know that sympathy and pity nourish no-one, you allow them to be washed clean to resurge as compassion, a potent emotion for transformation. Master of your sensibility, you become the mighty magnetiism that moves the tides, the flexible fluidity of their flow, and the light effervescence of the foam. Through intention you are integrated - the embodiment of life force energy of the Universe - Lightness, power and flow - as one.
Dog: As a white seal you are open-hearted, a way of being that allows you to wear your heart on your sleeve as a statement of your fearlessness and connectedness with all around you and with all of life. Open and loving, you have nothing to hide and everything to demonstrate. You are generous in giving and gracious in receiving, knowing that they are the same - By receiving, you allow others to love, which is giving. As love is for giving, it is forgiving. Love forgives by recognizing that in truth, there is nothing to forgive. All grievances arise from a lack of love in the beholder. Take a step up and you remember that there is only one of us out there - you-me-God-All-One. In which case if you feel any lack of love, it must be at or from a part of yourself. Effective processing of your life experiences will occur when illusion of separation disappears, and love declares itself to be: “All that Is”. As Dog, this is the Higher Truth you continually receive from the Universe and share from the heart. As you communicate this oneness through the demonstration of forgiveness and love, you integrate all aspects of yourself you nurture your power and purpose of unconditional love.
Monkey: As a blue seal your key way of being is clear-hearted. This puts you in the most effective space for surrendering without fear, judgement or attachment, only with trust, to the process of life. In this playground without boundaries, your magical inner child can embrace the awe, wonderment and fun of the universe. Owning both your purpose and your power, sweet surrender to life’s dance is your key you to processing and clarifying both. True acceptance of the universe as your guide means full commitment to the way/path it reveals to you, to follow your purpose and embrace your power. This integration makes you a formidable force for change. At one level Monkey represents mastery of the subconscious mind - The aspect of your mind that cannot distinguish between reality and illusion, truth and fiction, fact and fantasy. By being your vision for change (regardless of the perceived reality at the time), your conscious mind believes you are there, and so you become and create it. Monkey knows that most of what appears real is illusion, and most of what constitutes greater reality, seems illusory, non-existent, or at best invisible. This is the cosmic joke, that allows you to laugh with life. and play life as a magical game.
Human: As a yellow seal you are whole-hearted - the repleteness of the cup that ‘runneth over’. Living life from a ‘full cup’ is a self-fulfilling way of being! The more you give, the more you have to give! Free to give from your heart to the hearts of others, you are free to connect with all humanity and all of life. You rise to the calling of Human - to see yourself and others for who you really are - ‘human beings’, not ‘human doings’ or ‘human havings’, and to make a difference that you have lived. By wanting for - and giving to others what they truly want for themselves, you show unconditional giving and love. and you create community and kinship with life. Connecting with Creation, you connect with Divine Will. As Human you recognize that your will for you is God’s will for you. You understand the responsibility that comes with freedom - to use your free will wisely and for the highest good. People sabotage the difference they could make by blaming circumstance and those around them. When you own your perception pattern and choose to change them when they no longer serve you, you can process your experience to create a better life and a better world.
Skywalker: As a red seal, you are Strong-hearted, a way of being that supports your willingness to awaken those who are asleep to their limitless potential. Skywalker expresses into the world the awareness that we are spiritual beings having human experiences rather than vice versa. Skywalker knows that we are microcosms of the macrocosm created in the image of our Creator - with the power to create. And that by expanding our horizons and our self-esteem we can express the deep human urge to grow into ever greater ‘Universal Shoes’. At the same time, Skywalker has the gift of earthing Higher Consciousness so that it becomes accessible to all. This may be done through the teaching or sharing of principles, dynamics or laws of life. Thus it can be said that Skywalker stands at the threshold of two movements: The evolution of humanity, and the earthing of Spirit. Through our power of intention, be it in the form of affirmation, declaration or prayer, we initiate the connection between both thrusts. This allows us to experience and express that we are spirit in form and form inspired. Thus we embody the life force energy of the universe, and with it the recognition that heaven is within, and what we make of life on earth.
Wizard: As a white seal you are open-hearted, a way of being that keeps the path free and clear for Spirit to express itself through you. As the shaman you know that thought is energy, everything is in motion or vibration, and that time exists only in the present. You are able to change your own vibration by changing your thoughts, or through meditation, in the NOW. Refining your thoughts aligns you with the thoughts and vibration of Higher Mind, allowing you to see, hear and touch what is invisible, inaudable and intangible to most. Open to being a mouthpiece for Spirit you are open to inspire with charm. Communicating what you receive through your ‘sixth sense’, story telling, and other sharing of enchantment, you express your awareness of Higher Truth into the world. Equally, you express to others the power of thought to change vibration, experience, and matter, in the moment. As Wizard you express the alchemy of timelessness that only in the NOW can you be ‘out of your mind’ and ‘in spirit’ or inspired - consciously in tune with your Higher Self. And by moving beyond time-bound awareness, you can expand your mind, your quality of life, and the awareness of the world.
Eagle: As a blue seal you are clear-hearted, a way of being that allows you to draw new vision into your life and embrace the creative process that will manifest that vision. As Eagle you are aware of your power of vision to create the inner and outer world you desire. By your example, you express into the world the courage to ‘dream big’ for yourself and humanity. You express the power of your ‘mind’s eye’ to see the vision accomplished, and to hold that dream or vision in optimism. And you express the commitment to ‘flying home with the goods’(making it happen). True commitment is sweet surrender to the choice you make and then the actioning of that choice. And to then become or grow into that vision. Eagle knows that commitment to your purpose, power, and process, is commitment to your vision being realised - your key to success guaranteed. Such is the power of vision - by expanding your path it expands your life, and you evolve. As Eagle’s vision is always for the highest good of all, those whose lives you touch, evolve too.
Warrior: As a yellow sign you are whole-hearted, a way of being that comes from being at cause and at choice in your life. Warrior knows that ‘being’ leads to ‘doing’ leads to ‘having’. Your choice to be happy, confident, free and courageous, unconditioned by your ‘doing’ or having’, results in experiences in your life that match those ways of being. as Warrior you know you can be whatever, and however you want instantaneously, through choice. When you step into your power you take the attitude of ‘choosing’ your life experiences as they occur. This ownership of all of your experiences, both those you created consciously and unconsciously, moves you up a gear expanding your quality of life. Yet there is still another gear for Warrior: When you take on board the full power of your mind to create, you take responsibility for the condition of the world at large. As the Warrior of light you choose to create a different world by changing your pattern of perception. In answering this calling of your Higher Self you express your awareness into the world. Freed by your fearlessness, you step into your power and lead by example: Comfortable living in the mystery, your sword of light cuts to the chase finding answers where they are needed, opening up new mysteries; You speak the truth even when it is uncomfortable; Through the courage of your convictions, your quests find success, self-expression leads to mastery and you create ‘the impossible’ to be possible.
Mirror: As a white seal you are open-hearted. As Mirror this way of being allows you to see yourself and others for who you truly are. Open to the highest truth and possibility about youself, you see it in everyone else, regardless of how they ‘hold’ or see themselves. As a natural mentor and coach, you hold up a two-level mirror to others. Usually through questioning, you invite them to see where they are now, yet also to see the limitlessness of who they could be. If they do not accept your invitation, you hold no judgement, yet continue to make the mirror available unconditionally and with love, so they can reflect. This is the degree of your selflessness. By communicating what is possible to people, yet answering to their communicated need, you empower them to evolve at the level of awareness that they are ready for. As enough people tune in to receive a Higher Truth, collective awareness will start to shift. Your role as Mirror, is to facilitate this raising of consciousness to the point where humanity acts naturally from love and compassion in a new synergy of life - also known as peace. You strengthen others through questioning their internal dialogue.
Storm: As a blue seal you are clear-hearted. This allows you to dissolve all attachment, and empty yourself of ego, as the thunder clouds empty themselves to clear the sky. Storm is often the breakdown that preceeds the breakthrough. By your full surrender you become one with the void, a vacuum in which the grandest version of your greatest vision can be realised. Committing to this vision, you embrace transformation - becoming who you truly are. At the purest essence of our Divinity we remain unchanged, and yet to reach that consciousness, there is nothing but change: Changing circumstances, thoughts, impulses of energy, motion and results. As Storm, you know that in the face of change we either move down or up. Storm generates upward movement, as leadership, transformation, and evolution. Leadership is steering change towards our goals and vision. Transformation comes from a positive, creative response to the changes that occur. At a higher level, Storm knows that the transformation of one impacts on all, just as individual droplets of rain unify as rivers and oceans, only to rise again as quenching rain clouds. As Storm you facilitate the awareness of oneness between all human ‘droplets’ in the ocean of life, and wholeness in the fulfilment of their grandest vision and return to Source. Teacher, trainer or coach, you are a catalyst for this evolution of consciousness, in this ever re-generating synthesis of life.
Sun: As a yellow seal, you are whole-hearted. You are free to be in your full power and therefore free to be whole - body, mind and soul. As Sun, you are the steward of the the codes and laws that govern life and the unfolding of consciousness. You know that anything that presents itself to you as less then the love, light and perfection of the Universe arises out of a perception of separation. As Sun you know you are free to choose again - Recognizing that there is no separation in Higher Mind, you can take personal responsibility for the state of your life and the world. When the experience of wholeness or unity is generated, you synthesise life. Owning your changed perception pattern, generates the experience of wholeness and oneness with Creative Source, synthesizing life. When you step fully into the role of Sun you create the freedom and conditions in which leadership can flourish in the world, thus evolving consciousness. As you create and sustain environments that generate security, confidence and a desire to grow, people can play ‘evolving’ as a light, fun, and joyous game. This is true leadership, known by some as enlightenment. Your calling is to be a teacher of teachers, a trainer of trainers, or a leader of leaders.
Earth: A red seal, you are Strong-hearted, a way of being that empowers self-sufficiency. Your strength of will is directed at creating a self-generating planet with inhabitants who can stand on their own two feet. As Earth, you are aware that we are all connected in the intricate web of life - to each other, to all life, to the planet and beyond. We cannot harm another or the earth without harming ourselves, and in sustaining another we sustain ourselves. As Earth, you subscribe to 'teaching others to fish rather than feeding them fish'. This intention for self-sufficiency is the foundation stone on which you evolve a greater awareness - that of interdependence. In a mix of teamwork, community and co-operation, you create win-win scenarios for all - not on a one-off basis but in a sustainable way. You strengthen the systems of others through questioning the fundamentals of the system. Through your guardianship and leadership, those whose lives you touch, experience themselves as one with each other, with our earth, unified in the greater tapestry of life, and connected with the Source of all. This way you embody the life force energy of the universe to become a self-generating and self-regulating, organic whole.
